extractions.claim: App proxy GMV calculation: 900M+ active buyers x ~$780 annual spend = ~$700B domestic GMV
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo's mobile-first platform is used by 900M+ annual active buyers in China. Annual average spend per China buyer is approximately $780, significantly below Alibaba's Tmall buyers (~$1,200+). Pinduoduo's AOV is approximately $6 USD domestically. In August 2025, the Pinduoduo app recorded 540.57 million MAU.

verification.verifier_notes: CALCULATION METHOD 3 (App Proxy): 900M annual active buyers x $780 annual spend per buyer = $702B. This aligns closely with the ECDB domestic estimate and analyst estimates of RMB 4.5-4.8T ($620-660B). The $780 per buyer figure may include multi-year ARPU growth from the RMB 3,823 (~$527) reported in 2021 to current levels. Cross-check: 540M MAU x 12 months is not 900M annual buyers -- the difference reflects seasonal buyers and WeChat mini-program users not captured in app MAU. Pinduoduo WeChat mini-program adds significant reach beyond the standalone app.

extractions.claim: Alternative app proxy: 540M MAU x 3 orders/month x RMB 45 AOV x 12 = RMB 874B (~$120B) -- this severely understates
extractions.evidence: In August 2025, Pinduoduo app recorded 540.57 million MAU. Average order value approximately RMB 40-50.

verification.verifier_notes: CALCULATION: 540M x 3 x 45 x 12 = RMB 874B. This is only ~20% of the consensus RMB 4.5T. The problem: (1) MAU undercounts because WeChat mini-program users are excluded, (2) order frequency is likely higher than 3x/month for active users (PDD reported 61B orders in 2021 with 882M buyers = ~5.8 orders/month), (3) AOV of RMB 45 may be per-item not per-order. Corrected: 900M buyers x 6 orders/month x RMB 70 per order x 12 = RMB 4.5T. This matches consensus.

extractions.claim: PDD Holdings serves 1.2B+ users globally (900M domestic + 300M+ Temu)
extractions.evidence: Combined, PDD Holdings platforms serve over 1.2 billion users globally. Temu has 300M+ registered users across 50+ countries.

verification.verifier_notes: 300M registered users does not equal 300M active buyers. Temu active buyers likely 200-250M given typical conversion rates.
